steps.title: Write the base perimeter
steps.content:
The width is $x$, and the length is $2.5x$. The base is a rectangle, so its perimeter is
$$
2(x+2.5x)=2(3.5x)=7x
$$

steps.title: Apply the shipping limit
steps.content:
The perimeter plus height cannot exceed $130$ inches. With height $60$:
$$
7x+60\leq 130
$$

steps.title: Solve the inequality
steps.content:
Subtract $60$, then divide by $7$:
$$
7x\leq 70
$$
$$
x\leq 10
$$
Since width must be positive, $0<x\leq 10$.

steps.title: Match the allowable widths
steps.content: The allowable width is described by $0A.
